title: Thabangale song lyrics
stanzas:
[ thaabangale roobangalaai
paduthe thoduthe
azhaginai suduthe.

thaayaagave thaalaatuthe
vizhi vazhi mozhi
vazhiyinil kathayaai
varuthe.] (2)

kaalam
iravin puravi
aagaatho.
adhe kanaa
adhe vinaa

vaanam
nazhuvi thazhuvi
aadaathaa.
adhe nila
aruginil varuthe

thaabangale roobangalaai
paduthe thoduthe
azhaginai suduthe.

thaayaagave thaalaatuthe
vizhi vazhi mozhi
vazhiyinil kathayaai
varuthe

naan..
nanainthidum theeya
peyyum nila neeyaa
naan ..
anainthiduvena
aalaabanai neethaanaa

kadhal
kanaakkal thaanaa?
theeraa ulaa
naanaa, pothaathaa
kadhal
vinaakkal thaanaa?
aruginil vara manam
urugithan karaiyuthe.

thaabangale roobangalaai
paduthe thoduthe
azhaginai suduthe.

thaayaagave thaalaatuthe
vizhi vazhi mozhi
vazhiyinil kathayaai
varuthe
tamilStanzas:
தாபங்களே ரூபங்களாய்
படுதே.. தொடுதே ..
அழகினை சுடுதே.
தாயாகவே தாலாட்டுதே
விழி வழி மொழி வழியினில்
கதையாய் வருதே.

காலம் இரவின்
புரவி ஆகாதோ.
அதே கானா
அதே வினா

வானம் நழுவி
தழுவி ஆடாதா.
அதே நிலா
அருகினில் வருதே

தாபங்களே ரூபங்களாய்
படுதே.. தொடுதே ..
அழகினை சுடுதே.
தாயாகவே தாலாட்டுதே
விழி வழி மொழி வழியினில்
கதையாய் வருதே.

நான்..
நனைந்திடும் தீய பெய்யும்
நிலா நீயா
நான் ..
அணைந்திடுவேனா
ஆலாபனை நீதானா

காதல்
கனாக்கள்  தானா?
தீரா உலா நானா,
போதாதா காதல்
வினாக்கள் தானா?.
அருகினில் வர மனம்
உருகித்தான் கறையுதே.

தாபங்களே ரூபங்களாய்
படுதே.. தொடுதே ..
அழகினை சுடுதே.
தாயாகவே தாலாட்டுதே
விழி வழி மொழி வழியினில்
கதையாய் வருதே.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Thabangale?

The song Thabangale expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the beauty of cherished memories.

How does Thabangale fit into the plot of 96 Movie?

In 96 Movie, Thabangale serves as a poignant reminder of past relationships and the nostalgia associated with them.

Who are the singers of Thabangale?

The song features the talented voices of Chinmayi and Pradeep Kumar.

Who composed the music for Thabangale?

The music for Thabangale was composed by Govind Vasantha, known for his melodious tunes.

When was Thabangale released?

Thabangale was released on September 21, 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thabangale, the characters in 96 Movie reminisce about their past love, evoking a sense of nostalgia and longing. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics beautifully convey the emotions tied to cherished memories. It encapsulates the bittersweet essence of love, making listeners reflect on their own experiences. The collaboration between Chinmayi and Pradeep Kumar adds depth to the song, enhancing its romantic appeal.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thabangale from the 96 Movie is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and nostalgia. With Chinmayi's enchanting vocals paired with Pradeep Kumar's heartfelt rendition, this song is a perfect blend of emotion and melody. The exquisite composition by Govind Vasantha elevates the listening experience, making it a must-hear for romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: The beautiful one sings and plays, bringing forth beauty.
As a mother, she guides, and in the path of words, a story comes.
Time becomes a part of the night. That same dream, that same song.
The sky bends and dances. That same moon comes near.
The beautiful one sings and plays, bringing forth beauty.
As a mother, she guides, and in the path of words, a story comes.
Am I the moon that shines in your thoughts? Will I become the one who holds you?
Is love just a calculation? Or is it a feeling? Nearby, the heart melts and flows.
The beautiful one sings and plays, bringing forth beauty.
As a mother, she guides, and in the path of words, a story comes.
